captions.01.jpg: Bespoke bar area with luxury tile backsplash and custom floating shelves with solid brass tipping rails. The shelves were crafted from a solid slab of American Elm that was reclaimed from Austin Parks Department
captions.02.jpg: Before — cluttered countertop area adjascent to the kitchen
captions.03.jpg: After — the new bar area provides a dedicated space for entertaining and storage, while the open shelves and brass rails add a touch of elegance and functionality.
captions.04.jpg: Close up of the custom floating shelves shows the spalting (dark lines) and natural edge of the reclaimed American Elm, which adds character and warmth to the space. The precision tilework adds color and texture to the overall design. The solid brass tipping rails provide a practical solution for keeping bottles and glassware securely in place while also adding a classic stylish touch.
